supported_stacks: C# + ASP.NET Core + EF Core + PostgreSQL
metadata.latest_updates: February 2026: Updated C# stack to .NET 10 LTS / C# 14 / EF Core 10 / ASP.NET Core 10. Added HybridCache, Polly v8 resilience, built-in validation, OpenAPI 3.1, SSE, passkeys, named query filters, LeftJoin, extension members, field keyword. January 2026: Added infrastructure economics (FinOps, cost modeling, SLA-to-revenue mapping), edge runtimes (Hono, Elysia, Bun), tRPC for end-to-end type safety, vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Cloudflare Workers/Vercel Edge deployment patterns, Drizzle ORM expanded coverage, zero-trust security patterns.
